## ChildrenDirectiveOptions type

The options used to configure child/subtree node observation.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export type ChildrenDirectiveOptions<T = any> = ChildListDirectiveOptions<T> | SubtreeDirectiveOptions<T>;
```
